perturbation.original_text: The term “Information” does not include and this NDA will not apply to any information that : (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public (other than as a result of a disclosure by the undersigned or any of its Representativ es in violation of any obligation under this NDA); (b) was available to the undersigned or any of its Representatives on a non- confidential basis from a source other than BDO who, insofar as was known to the undersigned or any of its Representatives, was not prohibited from transmitting the information to the undersigned or any of its Representatives by a contractual, legal or fiduciary obligation to Baldwin , BDO or any third party; or (c) has been independently acquired or developed by the undersigned or any of its Representatives without violation of any obligation under this NDA ;
perturbation.changed_text: The term “Information” does not include and this NDA will not apply to any information that : (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public, regardless of the source; (b) was available to the undersigned or any of its Representatives, even on a confidential basis, from any source; or (c) has been acquired or developed by the undersigned or any of its Representatives, regardless of whether it violates this NDA.
perturbation.explanation: Clause 8 defines what 'Information' isn't covered by the NDA. The modification removes the restrictions on how the information became public or available, contradicting the original intent to protect information and weakening the NDA. In 'a' it says 'regardless of the source;' creating a contradiction to the original text, and therefore making it unenforceable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The term “Information” does not include and this NDA will not apply to any information that : (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public, regardless of the source; (b) was available to the undersigned or any of its Representatives, even on a confidential basis, from any source; or (c) has been acquired or developed by the undersigned or any of its Representatives, regardless of whether it violates this NDA.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of 'Information' that is excluded from the NDA's protection. Specifically, it removes the restrictions related to the source and circumstances under which the information becomes public or available. This contradicts the original intent to protect confidential information, as now any information, regardless of how it became public or available, is excluded from the NDA. The contradicted text is a repetition of the changed text, but the explanation clarifies that the changed text creates a conflict with the original intent of the NDA, causing an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The terms of this NDA shall expire , as it relates only to the Information associated with the Assets or parts thereof purchased or otherwise acquired by the undersigned, upon the completion of a Definitive Agreement . In all other cases, the terms of this NDA shall expire one (1) year after the completion of a sale or other transfer of the Assets.
perturbation.changed_text: The terms of this NDA shall expire , as it relates only to the Information associated with the Assets or parts thereof purchased or otherwise acquired by the undersigned, upon the completion of a Definitive Agreement, unless otherwise extended by mutual agreement. In all other cases, the terms of this NDA shall expire one (1) year after the completion of a sale or other transfer of the Assets, unless sooner terminated by BDO.
perturbation.explanation: Clause 12 defines the NDA's expiration. The modification introduces the possibility of extension or early termination, contradicting the original fixed expiration date. It originally expires with 'the completion of a Definitive Agreement', now it says 'unless otherwise extended by mutual agreement', creating a contradiction and ambiguity. This contradiction could cause disputes over the NDA's validity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The terms of this NDA shall expire , as it relates only to the Information associated with the Assets or parts thereof purchased or otherwise acquired by the undersigned, upon the completion of a Definitive Agreement, unless otherwise extended by mutual agreement. In all other cases, the terms of this NDA shall expire one (1) year after the completion of a sale or other transfer of the Assets, unless sooner terminated by BDO.
perturbation.justification: The original text states a fixed expiration date based on 'completion of a Definitive Agreement' or 'one (1) year after the completion of a sale'. The changed text introduces exceptions, allowing for extension by mutual agreement or early termination by BDO. This directly contradicts the original fixed expiration, as the NDA's term is no longer solely determined by the original conditions but can be altered. The Contradicted text is identical to the Changed text, indicating that the modification itself creates the contradiction within the clause. This aligns with the definition of 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' where a clause is placed in multiple locations with conflicting implications.
